name: Dark Chocolate Glaze (for Decadence Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small, heavy saucepan or microwave oven on medium, melt the broken chocolate with butter.
2. Stir frequently until smooth and melted.
3. Remove from heat and stir in milk, light corn syrup, and vanilla.
4. Place the 9-inch cake layer on a rack over a baking sheet.
5. When the glaze is cool, pour it onto the center of the cake.
6. Let the glaze run down the sides of the cake.
7. Use a spatula to smooth the glaze and coat the sides evenly.
8. Decorate the side of the cake with chopped nuts.
9. Chill for about 10 minutes to set the glaze.
